blended.narrative: Nub's Nob is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 38 ft. Looking ahead, 40 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 13°F. Expect powder.
